reviewed_head.subject: Implement review reply captured from workbench-tri-lane-001 implement review iteration-0002

review_scope.limitation: preparatory bounded slice only; not approvable for IMPLEMENT -> VERIFY

verdict.summary: Preparatory implement artifacts are acceptable as a preparation slice, but the lane is still not fully rebased and implement_to_verify must remain pending.

findings.summary: The packet still declares that the OpenAI-backed rebase is not complete, so the iteration must not advance to verify.
The preparatory slice is acceptable only if it is treated as prepared-for-rebase, not fully rebased.
The bundle scope must stop claiming rebased inventory/boundary artifacts until the actual rebase completes.
Re-implementation should open a new iteration and recreate the review-request bundle with the incremented iteration count.

next_patch_set: Open iteration-0003 for the narrowed preparatory rework
Change scope wording from rebased to prepared for rebase
Recreate the implement review bundle with iteration-0003 identifiers
